hero_subtitle: SFTY Business streamlines transaction compliance workflows by unifying alerts, risk data, provider outputs, and case management into a single audit-ready review platform.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Transaction compliance reviews depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with slow and fragmented transaction review processes that separate provider outputs and case management. This creates gaps in audit evidence and reduces clarity in tracing risk assessments before escalation or reporting.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links transaction data, provider alerts, case reviews, decision logs and audit evidence into a unified workflow so compliance teams can trace risk assessments and accelerate review before escalation.
workflow_title: From alerts to structured compliance cases
workflow_description: SFTY processes transaction alerts by applying rules, routing reviews, opening cases, recording decisions and preserving evidence for later reporting and audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY links fragmented transaction alerts into structured reviews, decision logs, cases and audit evidence for clearer compliance control in digital asset transaction workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a controlled environment to connect provider outputs, preserve audit evidence and support bank due diligence within enterprise-grade governance and deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support transaction compliance review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction alerts become structured case evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready logs support suspicious activity review
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for scalable VASP compliance operations
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into one compliance layer, enabling teams to structure reviews, decisions, cases and reports for consistent transaction and regulatory risk management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle transaction compliance reviews?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes alerts and provider checks into structured cases with linked customer, wallet and transaction data for thorough compliance review before escalation or reporting.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence in audit-ready formats to support internal review, bank due diligence and regulator inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, connecting them through role-based access, configurable rules and controlled deployment to streamline compliance workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, applying internal policies and preserving evidence for centralized compliance management.
final_title: Connect transaction compliance into structured workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects alerts, provider outputs and case evidence for streamlined transaction compliance review.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
